list.name: 更改
list.comment: ci: add gitee go backend deployment

project.component: { "keyToString": { "ASKED_SHARE_PROJECT_CONFIGURATION_FILES": "true", "DefaultGoTemplateProperty": "Go File", "Go 构建.go build github.com/paper-format-checker/backend.executor": "Debug", "Go 测试.github.com/paper-format-checker/backend/internal/handler 中的 TestAuthHandler_Register.executor": "Run", "Go 测试.github.com/paper-format-checker/backend/internal/handler 中的 TestGetAlipayAuthURL_Real.executor": "Run", "Go 测试.go test backend.executor": "Debug", "Go 测试.go test server.executor": "Run", "RunOnceActivity.OpenProjectViewOnStart": "true", "RunOnceActivity.ShowReadmeOnStart": "true", "RunOnceActivity.go.formatter.settings.were.checked": "true", "RunOnceActivity.go.migrated.go.modules.settings": "true", "RunOnceActivity.go.modules.automatic.dependencies.download": "true", "RunOnceActivity.go.modules.go.list.on.any.changes.was.set": "true", "WebServerToolWindowPanel.toolwindow.highlight.mappings": "true", "WebServerToolWindowPanel.toolwindow.highlight.symlinks": "true", "WebServerToolWindowPanel.toolwindow.show.date": "false", "WebServerToolWindowPanel.toolwindow.show.permissions": "false", "WebServerToolWindowPanel.toolwindow.show.size": "false", "git-widget-placeholder": "task1-v2-workflow-models", "go.import.settings.migrated": "true", "go.sdk.automatically.set": "true", "last_opened_file_path": "C:/Users/user/.config/superpowers/worktrees/paper/docx-closed-loop-task1", "node.js.detected.package.eslint": "true", "node.js.selected.package.eslint": "(autodetect)", "nodejs_package_manager_path": "npm", "settings.editor.selected.configurable": "preferences.editor" } }

MESSAGE.value: 清空页眉页脚内容：使用底层API实现
正文设置间距 设置值
RBAC 权限管理模型 获取角色的所有菜单（权限）
新增 论文模板学科字段 修改 同订单存在 pending 记录则复用 修改 扫码支付：调用 alipay.trade.precreate，返回 qr.alipay.com 链接 接入deepseek
支付宝扫码实现 .doc文件支持
格式修正引擎配置（python-docx 样式引用引擎）
以学生稿为主文档 → 从模板「学」样式再改学生稿 → 容易在分类、样式映射、分节、域字段上出偏差。
ci: add gitee go backend deployment

option.name: LAST_COMMIT_MESSAGE
option.value: ci: add gitee go backend deployment
